# clang trunk: assertion "Cannot retrieve a NULL type pointer" in QualType::getNonReferenceType during constexpr eval of comma expression with cast to VLA pointer type

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173915
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-30T00:37:25Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/M41j6Yndn

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

```c
exit ( 0 ) ;
```


## Code
```c
extern void abort ( void )
extern void exit ( int ;
int main ( void ) {
int a = 1 ;
if ( ( * ( ++ a , ( char ( * ) [ a ] ) 0 ) ) != 2 )
abort ( ) ;
exit ( 0 ) ;
}
```
</details>


---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Since Clang 6: https://godbolt.org/z/E5zKezss9

Only in C mode, not in C++ mode.

Reduces to (https://godbolt.org/z/7WKM6E7eY)
```cpp
void f(int a) {
(*((char(*)[a])0)) != 0;
}
```
Reduction also reproducible in C++ mode.

Likely duplicate of https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/78841.

---
